markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Demonstrate AfterShoot's workflow and features to a potential content creator for product-led articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AfterShoot dramatically speeds up photo culling, editing, and retouching for photographers](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [The AI learns user preferences and can be trained on custom editing styles](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Workflow: import → AI culling/editing → review in AfterShoot → export to Lightroom for final tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Retouching features allow quick adjustments to skin, clothing, etc. without manual editing](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Topics

### AfterShoot Workflow Overview

  - [Import photos directly from SD cards or external drives](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Select genre (e.g. wedding) for AI tailored to that style](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [One-click culling and editing option processes overnight](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Review AI selections and edits in the morning](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Export to Lightroom for final adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### AI Culling Features

  - [Selects best shots from similar groupings](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Filters for technical issues (e.g. closed eyes)](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Dramatically reduces number of photos to review (e.g. 12,000 → 1,500)](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [User can easily add/swap selections](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### AI Editing Capabilities

  - [Uses custom user profile trained on 2,500-10,000+ edited images](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Applies user's editing style across all photos dynamically](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Handles various lighting conditions based on training](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Marketplace profiles available for different styles](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### Retouching Tools

  - [Sliders for skin issues, wrinkles, clothing adjustments, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Currently requires exporting to/from Lightroom as JPEGs](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Working on integrating directly into main workflow](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### Time Savings

  - [Reduces edit time from weeks to days for large events](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Example: 12,000 wedding photos culled/edited overnight](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Allows photographers to focus on shooting, not editing](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Louise to email Nicolas links to weekly AfterShoot workshops](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [Nicolas to explore AfterShoot website for additional resources](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call to discuss specific product-led article topics](https://fathom.video/share/5nNeN-MQmbqNDVm4pRYfy7jEVzZj5MX8?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
